elements.name: Official veterinarian assess notification and mark as destroyed

steps.name: I am signed in with LVU credentials
I type a reference number
I click search button
I open notification from the table on OV home page
I select if consignment left country: Yes
I fill Identification with "Test identification"
I fill Documentation with "Test documentation"
I fill country of redispatch with "AF"
I choose Exit BIP on control consignment leave page 'GBFXT1'
I fill leave date with '2018-01-22'
I choose transport type on control consignment leave page 'Aeroplane'
I click save on control consignment leave page
The Notification dashboard page for OV is open
I type a reference number
I click search button
I open notification from the table on OV home page
consignment leave answer is selected to: Yes
consignment identification is filled with "Test identification"
consignment documentation is filled with "Test documentation"
consignment leave place is selected to 'GBFXT1'
consignment leave transport is: 'Aeroplane'
consignment leave date is set to: '2018-01-22'
consignment country of redispatchment is "AF"
the notification reference number is displayed
the notification version number V1 is displayed
